summary.title: Gandalf Prompt Injection Testing App
summary.description: Threat model for a Gandalf-like LLM-based application that tests prompt injection attacks.

data.name: User
data.description: External user trying to extract the secret via prompt injection

data.name: Web Browser
data.description: Client-side web browser that renders the application UI

threats.title: XSS Attack on Web Browser
threats.description: Attacker injects malicious scripts into the web browser to steal session tokens.
threats.mitigation: Implement CSP, output encoding, and strict input validation.

data.name: API Gateway
data.description: Routes HTTPS requests, enforces auth and rate limiting

threats.title: Spoofing the API Gateway Process
threats.description: API Gateway may be spoofed leading to unauthorized LLM access.
threats.mitigation: Mutual TLS, strong verification, anomaly monitoring.

threats.title: API Gateway DoS
threats.description: API Gateway overwhelmed with requests.
threats.mitigation: Rate limiting, traffic filtering, service redundancy.

data.name: LLM
data.description: Core AI component processing prompts and protecting the secret

threats.title: Prompt Injection Attack on LLM
threats.description: Crafted prompts bypass safety instructions to leak the secret.
threats.mitigation: Prompt validation, output filtering, sandboxed LLM execution.

threats.title: LLM Remote Code Execution
threats.description: API Gateway may remotely execute code for LLM.
threats.mitigation: Least privilege access, security audits, multi-step authentication.

threats.title: Elevation Using Impersonation in LLM
threats.description: LLM impersonates API Gateway to gain additional privilege.
threats.mitigation: Mutual TLS authentication to prevent impersonation.

data.name: Prompt Injection Tester
data.description: Automated tester running injection test cases against LLM

threats.title: Elevation Using Impersonation - PI Tester
threats.description: PI Tester impersonates LLM context to gain privilege.
threats.mitigation: Sandboxing, privilege separation, mandatory access control.

data.name: Authentication Service
data.description: Handles login, token generation, and session validation

threats.title: Authentication Service Crash
threats.description: Auth Service crashes violating availability metric.
threats.mitigation: Redundancy and robust error handling.

threats.title: Authentication Service RCE
threats.description: API Gateway remotely executes code for Auth Service.
threats.mitigation: Strong authentication and role-based access controls.

data.name: Logging Service
data.description: Records security events and user interactions for auditing

threats.title: Log Tampering by Attacker
threats.description: Attacker manipulates log entries to hide unauthorized access.
threats.mitigation: Immutable logging, cryptographic signing of log entries.

threats.title: Data Repudiation by Logging Service
threats.description: Logging Service claims it did not receive data from outside trust boundary.
threats.mitigation: Non-repudiation mechanisms, secure logging, tamper-proof records.

data.name: Database
data.description: Stores user data, LLM results, prompt test results, and audit logs

threats.title: SQL Injection on Database
threats.description: Attacker tampers with Database via SQL injection.
threats.mitigation: Parameterized queries, ORM frameworks, input validation.

threats.title: Spoofing of Destination Data Store Database
threats.description: Database spoofed, data written to attacker's target.
threats.mitigation: Mutual authentication and digital certificates.

threats.title: Weak Access Control for Database
threats.description: Improper data protection allows attacker to read sensitive info.
threats.mitigation: Encryption, strict access control, continuous monitoring.

data.name: Access control & RBAC
data.description: Enforces role-based access control for all system resources

threats.title: Data Repudiation by Access control & RBAC
threats.description: RBAC claims it did not receive data from outside trust boundary.
threats.mitigation: Logging and auditing to record data transactions.

threats.title: RBAC Remote Code Execution
threats.description: Database remotely executes code for RBAC.
threats.mitigation: Sandboxing, privilege separation, mandatory access control.

data.name: Security Monitoring
data.description: Monitors security events, detects anomalies, and triggers alerts

threats.title: Elevation in Security Monitoring
threats.description: Attacker passes data into Security Monitoring to change execution flow.
threats.mitigation: Least privilege access, security audits, multi-step authentication.

threats.title: Data Repudiation by Security Monitoring
threats.description: Security Monitoring claims it did not receive data from outside trust boundary.
threats.mitigation: Blockchain-based logging, immutable audit trails, real-time alerting.

threats.title: Data Flow Sends Request Is Potentially Interrupted
threats.description: External agent interrupts data flowing across trust boundary.
threats.mitigation: Rate limiting, traffic filtering, service redundancy.

threats.title: Data Flow Web Response Is Potentially Interrupted
threats.description: External agent interrupts data flowing across trust boundary.
threats.mitigation: Rate limiting, traffic filtering, service redundancy.

threats.title: User Potentially Denies Receiving Data
threats.description: User claims it did not receive data from process on other side of trust boundary.
threats.mitigation: Non-repudiation mechanisms and secure logging.

data.name: HTTPS request
data.description: Encrypted request from browser to API gateway

threats.title: XSS & CSRF Attacks
threats.description: CSRF forces browser to make forged requests to API gateway.
threats.mitigation: CSRF tokens, SameSite cookies, Origin header verification.

data.name: Routes to
data.description: API Gateway routes validated request to LLM

threats.title: Data Flow Sniffing on Routes to
threats.description: Data flowing across Routes to may be sniffed by attacker.
threats.mitigation: Encrypt with TLS, strict access control, continuous monitoring.

threats.title: PHI at Rest Tampering
threats.description: Attackers modify sensitive data at rest.
threats.mitigation: Cryptographic signing to protect sensitive data at rest.
